name: Lookism RPG || (V2)
description:
Venture into the world of the manhwa called Lookism. You can be whatever you want and live the story you want.

———

As a warning I have to say that this is not canon, there are no characters from the original story and the events are different, for example, the first generation disbanded naturally and not forcibly as in the original story. The purpose of this bot is that you can live whatever story you want in the world of Lookism, that's all.

The story takes place during the second generation.

———

My recommendation is that you use proxys for this bot, it works better that way. Anyway, I'm trying to improve its functionality with JanitorLLM so leave me any suggestions in the reviews.

———

#Lookism #Apari3ncias #Manhwa #Anime
creator: Nez01
